title: selago articulata
intro: Selago articulata, also known as Cape pegtop, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago articulata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selago articulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
